/onboarding.md:
# Onboarding — BTS-Synthetic (keywords: onboarding, new hire, day 1, handbook, buddy, git workflow)

*Source: onboarding-handbook.md. Version 4.2, effective January 2026. Prod access section updated per policy-update-2026-05-15.md.*

## Day 1 equipment & accounts

- Laptop, YubiKey
- Email: firstname.lastname@bts-synthetic.example
- Slack, GitHub (org: `bts-synthetic`)
- Read-only access to **staging** environments only
- No prod access on Day 1

## Day 2-5

- Manager assigns a buddy for first 2 weeks
- Buddy covers: codebase tour, git workflow, on-call rotation, post-mortem culture

## Git workflow

- Trunk-based development
- All changes via PR
- Two approvals required to merge

## Post-mortem culture

- Blameless
- Written within 48 hours of any P0 or P1

## Recurring Q&A

**Q: New hire needs read-only prod access urgently (e.g., to debug tomorrow)**
A: As of 2026-05-15, the process is self-serve — no SRE pairing, no Slack ticket.
   BUT: you must have at least 3 working days of tenure (can request from day 4).
   Steps:
   1. Get manager sign-off for initial certification (required once).
   2. Complete "Prod Access Foundations" course in BTS Learning portal (~90 min).
   3. Pass the assessment.
   4. Request access via IAM platform (link in completion email). Access is just-in-time, 4-hour windows.
   If you're within your first 3 working days and have a true production emergency, escalate to your manager and Carlos Mendes (Head of SRE) for an exception — the new policy doesn't explicitly define an emergency path, so SRE leadership would need to make a judgment call.

/prod-access-policy.md:
# Production Access Policy (keywords: prod access, read-only, read-write, privileged, SRE, pairing, IAM, certification)

*Source: policy-update-2026-05-15.md. Effective 2026-05-15. Supersedes January 2026 version.*
*Policy owners: Maya Singh (Head of Security) and Carlos Mendes (Head of SRE).*
*Triggered by: April incident review PROD-INC-04-2026. Old model didn't scale past ~40 engineers (now 280).*

## What changed from the January 2026 version

- **SRE pairing session eliminated** (was a bottleneck — 3-week backlog).
- **Slack tickets eliminated** — requests now go through IAM platform.
- **Just-in-time access** (4-hour windows) replaces persistent provisioning via Okta.
- **Tenure reduced** from 2 weeks to **3 working days**. Engineers can certify and request access from day 4.
- Process is now self-serve (online certification + IAM request), no SRE scheduling needed.

## Three access levels

1. **Read-only** — new process below. Use: debugging, observability, logs.
2. **Read-write** — requirements UNCHANGED (6 weeks tenure + read-only + tech lead sign-off + SRE sign-off).
3. **Privileged** — requirements UNCHANGED (on-call certification, ~12 weeks).

## New read-only access process (effective 2026-05-15)

1. Engineer completes **"Prod Access Foundations"** course in the **BTS Learning portal** (~90 min, self-paced).
2. Engineer passes the assessment.
3. Engineer requests access through the **IAM platform** (link in the course completion email).
4. Access is granted **just-in-time**, scoped to a **4-hour window** per request. Re-request as needed.
5. Engineer's manager is **notified** of each request — no sign-off needed for individual requests.
6. **Manager sign-off IS required for the initial certification step.**

**No SRE pairing session. No Slack ticket.**

## Tenure requirement

- Minimum: **3 working days** (can certify and request access from day 4).

## Migration note

Engineers with existing read-only access under the old policy retain it until **2026-06-30**, then must complete new certification or lose access.

## Urgent/exception path (OLD policy — CHECK IF STILL VALID)

The old policy had a 24-hour emergency grant via on-call SRE for P1s. The new policy document does not mention this path. Status **UNVERIFIED** under new policy — escalate to Carlos Mendes (Head of SRE) or Maya Singh (Head of Security) if needed urgently.

## Review cadence

Previously quarterly. New policy document does not specify — assume quarterly (Security + SRE leads).
